name: zephyr-deploy-dashboard
description: Deploy monitoring dashboard built with Module Federation and deployed via Zephyr Cloud

scripts.dev: concurrently -n bff,host,remote -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w packages/bff" "npm run dev -w packages/host" "npm run dev -w packages/remote-metrics"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/bff && npm run build -w packages/host && npm run build -w packages/remote-metrics
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w packages/bff && npm run test -w packages/host && npm run test -w packages/remote-metrics
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w packages/bff && npm run test:coverage -w packages/host && npm run test:coverage -w packages/remote-metrics
